g.aria-label: Gradient legend titled '生存確率' for fill color with values from 0.0 to 1.0
Title text '50歳開始 - 80歳時点の生存確率 (%)'
X-axis titled 'シナリオ' for a discrete scale with 7 values: A:制度なし, B:受給しない, C:60歳受給 (10.0万/月), D:65歳受給 (13.2万/月), E:免除-60 (9.1万/月), F:免除-65 (12.0万/月), G:未納-65 (11.1万/月)
Y-axis titled '(初期資産, 年間支出)' for a discrete scale with 3 values: (20000, 800), (10000, 400), (5000, 200)
